text.title: AI Design Assistant Patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed when applying ai-design-assistant-patterns. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Plugin offers sidebar suggestions + inline corrections + modal generation; users abandon.
Sidebar advice keeps showing yesterday's selection; users disable.
antipattern.root-cause: Context window invalidated faster than sidebar refresh.
antipattern.fix: Switch to inline OR widen refresh trigger.

antipattern.symptom: Modal requires 7 form fields; 60 % abandon mid-flow.
antipattern.root-cause: Author treated modal as full UI.
antipattern.fix: Cap at 3 clicks; defer extras to a settings page.

antipattern.symptom: CI runs a sidebar-style assistant; nobody sees the suggestions.
antipattern.root-cause: Sidebar chosen for an agent trigger.
antipattern.fix: Use review-mode with structured JSON for agent triggers.
